data.title: UNITS® Portable Storage partners with HGTV's Property Brothers in Los Angeles, enhancing production quality.
data.description: In Los Angeles on December 12, 2025, UNITS® Moving and Portable Storage announced its continued partnership with the production team of HGTV's popular show Property Brothers, led by Drew and Jonathan Scott. The collaboration involves providing storage solutions for the show's upcoming episodes, with the exact number of episodes and specific details to be released soon.

data.title: National Trust for Historic Preservation files lawsuit to halt White House Ballroom construction.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, in Washington, the National Trust for Historic Preservation initiated legal proceedings in the US District Court for the District of... The organization, established by Congress in 1949, aims to engage the public in conserving historically important sites.

data.title: Marriott Vacations Worldwide Corp increases quarterly dividend to $0.80/share, payable on Jan 7, 2026 & extends share repurchase authorization.
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, Marriott Vacations Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: VAC) declared an increase in its quarterly dividend, raising it to $0.80 per common stock share. The dividend will be paid around January 7, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of December 24, 2025. The Board of Directors also extended the share repurchase authorization of the company until December 31, 2026. Share repurchases are permitted under this authorization.

data.title: Tether looks to tokenize stock in $20B fundraise, aiming for a $500B valuation, per Bloomberg.
data.description: Tether, the stablecoin issuer, has taken measures to halt equity sales following reports by Bloomberg indicating their intention to generate funds at a valuation of $500 billion.

data.title: Tech company Figure plans second IPO on Solana to issue blockchain-native equity, enabling onchain trading beyond stock markets.
data.description: A company, identified as "Figure", is in the process of organizing its second Initial Public Offering (IPO) with the objective of issuing blockchain-native equity on the Solana platform. This move is aimed at facilitating onchain trading and enabling the use of Decentralized Finance (DeFi) for various purposes that go beyond the conventions of traditional stock markets. This initiative indicates an increasing interest in leveraging blockchain technology for financial activities and is indicative of the growing convergence between traditional finance and the decentralized finance ecosystem.

data.title: Citi recommends buying GE Aerospace, predicts market cap could reach $1 trillion due to megatrends. GE stock rises.
data.description: A recent report by Citi has assigned a buy rating to GE Aerospace, foreseeing significant growth potential due to megatrends. The analysis predicts a substantial increase in market capitalization, possibly reaching up to $1 trillion. This positive evaluation has spurred a bullish movement in GE stock prices, indicating favorable market sentiment towards the company's future prospects in the aerospace sector.

data.title: EMA recommended Eli Lilly's Mounjaro for children as young as 10, leading Eli Lilly's rise.
data.description: Europe's drug regulator has suggested expanding the approval of Eli Lilly's type 2 diabetes medication, Mounjaro, to include children aged 10 and above. This move has caused shares of Eli Lilly to rise once more following the recommendation by the European Medicines Agency (EMA). This development was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Bitcoin's value falls due to potential exclusion from indices, affecting passive funds. Test's outcome critical.
data.description: The exclusion from major stock indices, which are followed by passive funds, may limit the ability to purchase bitcoin. Bitcoin prices are expected to face pressure as a result of this strategy shift. Today's events will serve as a crucial test for both the strategy and bitcoin's performance.

data.title: SkyTech Orion Global Corp (CTGL) is ahead in global small-drone market. Israeli subsidiary selected for national center.
data.description: In a recent announcement on December 12, 2025, SkyTech Orion Global Corp. (CTGL), operating under a U.S. parent company, specializes in developing the modular SkyTech Replicator™ drone family and the groundbreaking Replication Manufacturing Method™. The company's Israeli subsidiary, SkyTech Orion Ltd., was chosen to set up Israel’s National Drone Innovation and Manufacturing Center under a government-supported initiative. Following active participation in key international conferences and exhibitions in the U.S., Europe, and Israel, the company issued a strategic update.(Note: This version is approximately 477 characters long)

data.title: SPIE's successful SHARE FOR YOU 2025 employee shareholding plan and plan for anti-dilutive share buyback program.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, in Cergy, SPIE, a prominent European company specializing in energy and communication services, revealed the achievements of its SHARE FOR YOU 2025 initiative aimed at employee shareholding.

data.title: Efficacy of Inluriyo in advancing breast cancer: 11.4-month improvement in OS with monotherapy, 10.9-month median PFS with abemaciclib combo.
data.description: In a study comparing monotherapy with imlunestrant versus endocrine therapy, a significant improvement of 11.4 months in median overall survival (OS) was observed in patients with ESR1-mutated disease. When examining all patients, the combination of imlunestrant and abemaciclib led to a median progression-free survival (PFS) of 10.9 months. Additionally, this combination showed a positive trend towards overall survival.

data.title: FDA approved GSK's drug for Gonorrhoea treatment; 600,000 cases reported in US in 2023. GSK stock rising.
data.description: The FDA has given approval to GSK Plc's supplemental New Drug Application for gepotidacin as an oral treatment for uncomplicated urogenital gonorrhea, a sexually transmitted infection caused by Neisseria gonorrhoeae. In 2023, there were over 600,000 reported cases of gonorrhea in the U.S., with it being the second most commonly reported STI in the country. This approval applies to adult and pediatric patients aged 12 and above, weighing at least 45 kg, with limited or no other treatment options for this type of gonorrhea. GSK stock is currently on the rise following this news. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.
